title: Promotion Policy Schema
description: Defines the promotion policy for epsilon-Pareto selection of optimal configurations.

ChanceConstraint.description: Probabilistic constraint requiring a metric to meet a threshold with specified confidence

name.description: Name of the metric this constraint applies to

confidence.description: Required probability of meeting the threshold (0 to 1)

min_effect.description: Minimum practical effect size per metric (metric_name -> threshold)

tie_breakers.description: Tie-breaking strategy per metric when configurations are statistically equivalent

require_calibration.description: TVL 1.1 strict evidence mode (RFC 0001 §3.5/§3.6): when enabled, promotion requires certificate-backed evidence; runs without a certified selection end with reason_code NO_CERTIFIED_SELECTION instead of a raw best. hash_covered_context selects EXTENSION keys only — the mandatory freshness-context core is implicit and not configurable. Field semantics mirror tvl/spec/grammar/tvl.schema.json §promotion_policy (same required/enum members); this copy additionally pins items.type and uniqueItems as wire hardening.
